column1: # Argument match ordering tests
# Verifies that signature matching works regardless of whether args arrive
# from prefix (stack) or suffix (future tokens), and in any order when
# types are distinct.
# Core invariant: f a b c d = d c b a f = any mix of prefix/suffix.
# Same-type args preserve positional order (sub 10 3 = 7, not sub 3 10).
# Format: expression<TAB>expected result
# 2-param: [Opts Integer] — distinct types (Map vs Integer)
# Define: Opts={x:Integer}, fn adds x field to integer arg
# Body: (m . x) add n
# --- All call orderings ---
# Both suffix (opts first, int second)
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] f {x:4} 3
# Both prefix (positional order matches sig)
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] {x:4} 3 f
# Infix: map prefix, int suffix
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] {x:4} f 3
# Infix: int prefix, map suffix — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] 3 f {x:4}
# Both prefix (reversed positional order) — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] 3 {x:4} f
# Both suffix (int first, opts second) — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] f 3 {x:4}
# 2-param: [Integer String] — distinct scalar types
# fn that concatenates string with integer
# Body: s add n
# Both suffix (positional)
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] g 5 "val:"
# Both prefix (positional)
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] 5 "val:" g
# Infix: int prefix, string suffix
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] 5 g "val:"
# Infix: string prefix, int suffix — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] "val:" g 5
# Both prefix (reversed) — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] "val:" 5 g
# Both suffix (reversed) — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def g fn [[n:Integer s:String] [String] [s add n]] g "val:" 5
# 2-param: [Integer Integer] — same types preserve order
# sub 10 3 = 7, not sub 3 10 = -7
10 3 sub
10 sub 3
sub 10 3
# 3-param: [Opts Integer String] — three distinct types
# fn returns (m . x) add n add s
# Body: (m . x) add n add s
# All suffix (positional)
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] h {x:10} 5 "!"
# All prefix (positional)
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] {x:10} 5 "!" h
# Mixed: map+int prefix, string suffix
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] {x:10} 5 h "!"
# Mixed: map prefix, int+string suffix
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] {x:10} h 5 "!"
# Mixed: int prefix, map+string suffix — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] 5 h {x:10} "!"
# Mixed: string prefix, map+int suffix — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] "!" h {x:10} 5
# All prefix scrambled: int string map — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] 5 "!" {x:10} h
# All prefix scrambled: string map int — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] "!" {x:10} 5 h
# All prefix scrambled: string int map — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] "!" 5 {x:10} h
# All prefix scrambled: int map string — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] 5 {x:10} "!" h
# All prefix scrambled: map string int — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def h fn [[m:Opts n:Integer s:String] [String] [(m . x) add n add s]] {x:10} "!" 5 h
# Optional Options with ordering
# Optional Opts + required Integer — opts provided in different orders
# Suffix: opts then int
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] f {x:10} 5
# Suffix: int then opts — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] f 5 {x:10}
# Prefix: opts then int (positional)
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] {x:10} 5 f
# Prefix: int then opts (reversed) — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] 5 {x:10} f
# Infix: int prefix, opts suffix — REQUIRES FLEXIBLE MATCH
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] 5 f {x:10}
# Optional omitted — just int
def Opts (make Options {x:1}) def f fn [[m?:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [n]] f 5
# Extra values on stack should not be consumed
# Extra value before args, not consumed
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] 99 {x:4} 3 f
# Extra value with reversed arg order
def Opts (make Options {x:Integer}) def f fn [[m:Opts n:Integer] [Integer] [(m . x) add n]] 99 3 {x:4} f
# Boolean + Integer — distinct scalar subtypes
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] p true 5
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] true 5 p
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] 5 p true
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] 5 true p
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] true p 5
def p fn [[b:Boolean n:Integer] [Integer] [if b [n] [0]]] p 5 true
